title: crataegus oliveriana
intro: Crataegus oliveriana, also known as Oliver's hawthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crataegus oliveriana include reducing cardiovascular disease risk, improving blood pressure, and providing protection against certain types of cancer. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
